reachability_artifacts: sworn capabilities output for reachable and unreachable configured keyless endpoints
end-to-end sworn run exit 0 with recorded implementer requests to a configured local OAI endpoint
actual local Ollama sworn run output/exit code or explicit prerequisite skip
keyProbe mutation unavailable output followed by restored reachability-probe available output

effort_complexity.rationale: See spec.json; implementer must re-assess against live code before design review.

release_benefit: A SwornAgent operator can run the full accountable implement-verify loop on Ollama Cloud or a chosen local OpenAI-compatible server, while maintainers add endpoints as data and detect provider wire drift before it reaches production.

positive_scenarios: Capabilities reports a live local endpoint reachable from its /models response.
Models lists local IDs under the same canonical prefix.
The full loop sends implementer tool traffic to local Ollama and completes with capable structured-role models.
negative_scenarios: A missing key does not make a keyless local endpoint unavailable.
Unreachable local defaults finish within one concurrent timeout window and expose no bodies.
A config-derived endpoint cannot be lost on single, parallel, or nested RunSlice paths.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: Truthful keyless enumeration plus config-consistent registry injection turns local endpoints from verify-only utilities into reliable implementer compute for the accountable loop.

design_decisions.choice: Probe keyless local endpoints during enumeration only and treat the real dispatch request as authoritative.
design_decisions.human_decision: Option A selected by repository owner on 2026-07-14.
design_decisions.rationale: Enumeration stays truthful without redundant time-of-check/time-of-use requests on every model call.

design_decisions.choice: Deliver local implementer reachability now while preserving capability-based eligibility for every role.
design_decisions.human_decision: Option A selected with explicit S04/S05 and sworn#86 follow-up on 2026-07-14.
design_decisions.rationale: The endpoint unlock ships without hard-coding provider role restrictions or duplicating capability discovery.
